channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Alibaba’s AI potential remains undervalued, says First Eagle Fund manager
item.description: The manager of First Eagle Fund, a $17 billion investment fund, claims that Alibaba's current share price reflects only its e-commerce operations, overlooking significant AI growth opportunities. This assessment suggests that investors are missing out on the … [Alibaba]

item.title: The Key Podcast: Calif. Community Colleges Work to Scale Credit for Prior Learning

item.title: Bridgewater's chief scientist Sekhon to join Google's DeepMind AI unit
